description: R2d L3 coverage goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Each <fixture>.l3cov.golden.json is the ALLOWLISTED projection of a RESOLVED SemanticModel's `model.coverage` (AnalysisCoverage), READ post-resolve / pre-summary (`indexWorkspace` → `resolveModel` ONCE; the dump NEVER re-runs buildCoverage — it READS model.coverage). sourceUnitsTotal/sourceUnitsParsed/routinesTotal/routinesBodyAvailable as numbers; routinesParseIncomplete as a SORTED StableRoutineId[] (duplicates preserved); opaqueApps as appGuid[] (empty source-only); unresolvedCallsites as a SORTED StableCallsiteId MULTISET (callGraph edges with resolution ∈ {unknown, ambiguous, member-not-found, external-target} — NOT opaque/builtin/maybe; duplicates PRESERVED, NO dedup); dynamicDispatchSites as a SORTED StableOperationId MULTISET (edges with dispatchKind === 'dynamic'; duplicates PRESERVED). See scripts/r2d-l3cov-projection.ts.
capturePoint: post-resolve/pre-summary (indexWorkspace → resolveModel ONCE; READ model.coverage, no rebuild)
note: INDEX-DIAGNOSTIC DEPENDENCY: sourceUnitsParsed = sourceUnitsTotal minus units whose id is the sourceRef of an index-stage WARNING diagnostic (EXACTLY stage:'index' + severity:'warning' + sourceRef===SourceUnit.id; info does NOT decrement). resolveModel is fed the REAL indexDiagnostics. For the source-only corpus the decrement path is INERT (see failedUnitRefsAssessment below) — a warning-unparsed VECTOR (scripts/r2d-goldens/l3cov-vectors.json) covers it with al-sem's exact diagnostic shape so Rust can reproduce it. EXCLUDED (later gates): callGraph (R2b), eventGraph (R2c), typedEdges/summary (L4/R3), analysisGaps (R2.5 — opaqueApps from body-unavailable DEP routines + dep-app boundaries). MULTISETS preserve duplicates; do NOT dedup on either side.

failedUnitRefsAssessment.note: INERT — no source-only fixture emits an index-stage warning; sourceUnitsParsed === sourceUnitsTotal everywhere. The decrement path is covered ONLY by the warning-unparsed vector (an empty .al file → 'Failed to index ...' warning).

exclusions.reason: empty model (0 objects/0 routines) — fail-closed single-app provider; not source-only-analyzable
